name: segov.dev
description: A portfolio website built with Next.js and deployed on Vercel. It features information about my professional experience and side projects, plus an AI-powered AMA chatbot built with Vercel AI SDK Agents. The chat uses AI Gateway for model routing and retrieves resume context from private Vercel Blob storage.

name: Ship Spec CLI
description: AI-powered CLI tool for codebase analysis and production readiness evaluation. Features interactive planning workflows with PRD/tech spec generation, semantic chunking via Tree-sitter, and agentic workflows using LangGraph with human-in-the-loop review cycles.
